brand.tagline: Invitation, live celebration, and family archive in one cinematic digital home.

stages.headline: Personalized invitation journeys
stages.description: Every guest receives a tailored link with RSVP, schedule, and a polished cinematic entrance.

stages.headline: Real-time wedding day storytelling
stages.description: The experience transforms into a live event hub for streaming, updates, and guest participation.

stages.headline: A private archive for the family
stages.description: After the wedding, the same platform becomes a protected memory vault with posts, albums, and milestones.
